'''Vasnish Kay''' was a [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] bard who traveled with her merchant family across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] when she was young.

While Kay was an adolescent, her parents were killed in a tragic accident. Rather than return to her native [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]], Kay set out to explore the galaxy, trading stories and information for passage.

Kay's great life goal was to find someone to tell her more about the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]].

{{Char-stub}}
